name: admit
displayName: Admit — College Admissions Copilot for Families
description: US high school planning, college admissions prep, and application management for families. College list building on live federal data (College Scorecard, IPEDS), policy-compliant essay coaching that never ghostwrites, deadline tracking with calendar export, personalized grade 9-12 roadmaps, testing plans, financial aid guidance, scholarship matching, and full support for Common App, UC, CSU, ApplyTexas, and international (F-1) applicants.

scorecard_api_key.title: College Scorecard API key
scorecard_api_key.description: Optional. Free instant key at https://api.data.gov/signup (1,000 requests/hour). Leave blank to use DEMO_KEY (30 requests/hour).

careeronestop_user_id.title: CareerOneStop User ID
careeronestop_user_id.description: Optional, enables scholarship search. Free registration at https://www.careeronestop.org/Developers/WebAPI/registration.aspx

careeronestop_token.title: CareerOneStop API token
careeronestop_token.description: Optional. Issued together with the User ID above.
